hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const o=JSON.parse(d);console.log(o.tool_input?.file_path||'');}catch(e){console.log('');}});" | { read -r f || exit 0; [[ "$f" == */public/* ]] && exit 0; hugo build --gc --minify 2>&1 | tail -5; } 2>/dev/null || true
